subject: Build Fundraiser Campaign Page
description:
The most complex page. Editorial layout with conversion focus.

Walk the repo first: read CLAUDE.md, then design/frontend/src/components/showcase/ShowcasePage.jsx (campaign-preview section, lines ~271-430) for layout patterns.

Work:
- Magazine-style two-column layout: 7-col story + 5-col sticky donate panel (on lg+, stacked on mobile)
- Hero image with campaign title, category badges, days-left badge
- Organizer card with avatar, name, verification history, trust signals
- Rich text story section (AI-generated content from fixtures)
- Sticky donation panel: progress bar, amount raised vs goal, backer count, average gift
- Donate button (amber #D97706) that opens a modal with preset amounts ($25/$50/$100/$250/custom) and success toast
- Recent donation feed (names, amounts, timestamps from fixtures)
- Detail image + story card grid below hero
- All interactive elements get data-testid attributes
- Responsive: works at 375px and 1440px

Explore freely: the design reference is a starting point, not a constraint. If you find a better way to present the campaign story or donation panel, go for it.

Write back to CLAUDE.md:
- Component structure for this page
- Any new shared components created
- UX decisions made (especially around the donate modal)

changes: Created app/src/pages/CampaignPage.jsx - full editorial layout with 7+5 grid, hero image, organizer card, story, testimonials, update timeline, sticky donate panel with progress/stats/donation feed
Created app/src/components/DonateModal.jsx - preset amounts ($25/$50/$100/$250) + custom input, simulated flow with 800ms delay and success toast
Updated CLAUDE.md with Campaign Page structure and DonateModal docs
learnings: Fixed 'now' timestamp in formatRelativeTime to match fixture dates (2026-03-07T17:00:00Z) for stable demo display
Dynamic import of sonner causes Vite warning when module is also statically imported elsewhere - use static import instead
loose_ends: Only 1 detail image per campaign in fixtures (campaign-detail.jpg) - all campaigns share same hero/detail images. Polish pass should add unique images
Share button uses clipboard API without fallback for older browsers - acceptable for interview project
